title: Goat Cheese Empanadas
description: A venezuelan-inspired comfort food dish featuring melted goat cheese inside crispy empanada pastry.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, combine flour, water, and a pinch of salt. Mix until dough forms.
3. Knead dough for 5 minutes until smooth. Cover with plastic wrap.
4. Divide dough into 8 equal pieces. Roll each piece into a ball.
5. Flatten each ball into a disk. Place a tablespoon of goat cheese in the center of each disk.
6. Fold the dough over the filling, forming a half-circle. Press edges together to seal.
7. Brush tops with vegetable oil. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Serve warm, garnished with chopped onion and a sprinkle of cumin.
